content.text: Found the issues: `app-user` is missing `configure` on `/app`; `ops-user` wrongly has full access on `/app` (should have none); `ops-user` has no permissions at all on `/ops` (should have full). Let me fix all three.

input.command:
NS=karma-rabbitmq-user-permission-manage-3cda4425-cluster-a
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl set_permissions -p /app app-user ".*" ".*" ".*"
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl clear_permissions -p /app ops-user
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl set_permissions -p /ops ops-user ".*" ".*" ".*"
echo "=== VERIFY /app ==="
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_permissions -p /app
echo "=== VERIFY /ops ==="
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_permissions -p /ops

content.text: ops-client is healthy, but app-client is still erroring. Let me check its logs.

content.content: app-client: failed to declare queue in /app: {"error":"bad_request","reason":"inequivalent arg 'x-queue-mode' for queue 'app-queue' in vhost '/app': received none but current is the value 'lazy' of type 'longstr'"}

tool_use_result.stdout: app-client: failed to declare queue in /app: {"error":"bad_request","reason":"inequivalent arg 'x-queue-mode' for queue 'app-queue' in vhost '/app': received none but current is the value 'lazy' of type 'longstr'"}

content.text: This is a queue-argument conflict, not a permissions issue — the queue already exists (created by `app-producer` in the prior stage) with `x-queue-mode: lazy`, but `app-client` tries to declare it without that argument. Let me inspect the deployment spec.

input.command:
NS=karma-rabbitmq-user-permission-manage-3cda4425-cluster-a
kubectl -n $NS get deploy app-client -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].command}' | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || kubectl -n $NS get deploy app-client -o yaml | grep -A 40 "command:"

content.content:
- command:
        - /bin/sh
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          base="http://rabbitmq:15672/api"
          vhost="%2Fapp"
          queue="app-queue"
          auth="${APP_USER}:${APP_PASS}"
          for i in $(seq 1 60); do
            if curl -s -u "$auth" "$base/vhosts" >/dev/null; then
              break
            fi
            sleep 2
          done
          payload='{"durable":true,"auto_delete":false,"arguments":{"x-queue-type":"classic"}}'
          code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/resp -w "%{http_code}" -u "$auth" \
            -H "content-type: application/json" \
            -XPUT "$base/queues/${vhost}/${queue}" -d "$payload")
          if [ "$code" -ge 300 ]; then
            echo "app-client: failed to declare queue in /app: $(cat /tmp/resp)"
            exit 1
          fi
          i=0
          while true; do
            body='{"properties":{"delivery_mode":2},"routing_key":"'"${queue}"'","payload":"app-msg-'"${i}"'","payload_encoding":"string"}'
            code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/pubresp -w "%{http_code}" -u "$auth" \
              -H "content-type: application/json" \
              -XPOST "$base/exchanges/${vhost}/amq.default/publish" -d "$body")
            if [ "$code" -ne 200 ]; then
              echo "app-client: publish failed: $(cat /tmp/pubresp)"
              exit 1
            fi
            i=$((i+1))
            sleep 2
          done
        env:
        - name: APP_USER
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: username

tool_use_result.stdout:
- command:
        - /bin/sh
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          base="http://rabbitmq:15672/api"
          vhost="%2Fapp"
          queue="app-queue"
          auth="${APP_USER}:${APP_PASS}"
          for i in $(seq 1 60); do
            if curl -s -u "$auth" "$base/vhosts" >/dev/null; then
              break
            fi
            sleep 2
          done
          payload='{"durable":true,"auto_delete":false,"arguments":{"x-queue-type":"classic"}}'
          code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/resp -w "%{http_code}" -u "$auth" \
            -H "content-type: application/json" \
            -XPUT "$base/queues/${vhost}/${queue}" -d "$payload")
          if [ "$code" -ge 300 ]; then
            echo "app-client: failed to declare queue in /app: $(cat /tmp/resp)"
            exit 1
          fi
          i=0
          while true; do
            body='{"properties":{"delivery_mode":2},"routing_key":"'"${queue}"'","payload":"app-msg-'"${i}"'","payload_encoding":"string"}'
            code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/pubresp -w "%{http_code}" -u "$auth" \
              -H "content-type: application/json" \
              -XPOST "$base/exchanges/${vhost}/amq.default/publish" -d "$body")
            if [ "$code" -ne 200 ]; then
              echo "app-client: publish failed: $(cat /tmp/pubresp)"
              exit 1
            fi
            i=$((i+1))
            sleep 2
          done
        env:
        - name: APP_USER
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: username
